data.body: Implemented: added .github/module-size-allowlist.txt (8 grandfathered files); rewrote the warn-only echo into a Module-size gate that fails on a new non-allow-listed file over 800 LOC (validated locally: passes current tree, fails on injected 900-LOC file, removed Linux-only guard); refreshed the architecture.md offenders table to all 8 files with accurate LOC+remedies and moved mcp_server.py/applier.py out of the watch-band prose. Commit cb196de9.
